_meta.description: Guided region recipes for annotate_regions.py. Draw each box in order on the listed screenshot.
_meta.box_format: [x, y, width, height] in landscape PNG pixels (1920x1080)

recipes.summary: Active Pokémon on field (doubles command menu)

regions.title: Player A — sprite icon
regions.hint: Tight box around the small menu/circular sprite in the LEFT bottom HUD panel (Raichu).

regions.title: Player A — HP bar
regions.hint: Box over the green HP bar and numeric HP text (e.g. 137/137) for the left panel.

regions.title: Player B — sprite icon
regions.hint: Sprite icon in the RIGHT bottom HUD panel (Gyarados). Do not overlap slot A.

regions.title: Player B — HP bar
regions.hint: HP bar + numbers for the right player panel (e.g. 172/172).

regions.title: Opponent A — sprite icon
regions.hint: Sprite in the LEFT top opponent HUD panel (Azumarill).

regions.title: Opponent A — HP bar
regions.hint: HP bar for left opponent (often shows 100%).

regions.title: Opponent B — sprite icon
regions.hint: Sprite in the RIGHT top opponent HUD panel (Heracross).

regions.title: Opponent B — HP bar
regions.hint: HP bar for right opponent.

recipes.summary: Player nameplate species text (above each HP bar) for closed-set OCR identity

regions.title: Player A — nameplate name
regions.hint: Tight box around ONLY the species NAME text in the LEFT bottom HUD panel (just above the green HP bar / level). Exclude level number, gender symbol, and HP digits.

regions.title: Player B — nameplate name
regions.hint: Species NAME text in the RIGHT bottom HUD panel (above its HP bar). Name text only; do not overlap slot A.

recipes.summary: Team preview (empty, no selection highlights) — ally + enemy sprites

regions.title: Ally slot 1 — sprite
regions.hint: Menu sprite on row 1 of YOUR team (left column, top).

regions.title: Ally slot 2 — sprite
regions.hint: Row 2 ally sprite.

regions.title: Ally slot 3 — sprite
regions.hint: Row 3 ally sprite.

regions.title: Ally slot 4 — sprite
regions.hint: Row 4 ally sprite.

regions.title: Ally slot 5 — sprite
regions.hint: Row 5 ally sprite.

regions.title: Ally slot 6 — sprite
regions.hint: Row 6 ally sprite (bottom).

regions.title: Enemy slot 1 — sprite
regions.hint: Opponent menu sprite row 1 (right column).

regions.title: Enemy slot 2 — sprite
regions.hint: Enemy row 2.

regions.title: Enemy slot 3 — sprite
regions.hint: Enemy row 3.

regions.title: Enemy slot 4 — sprite
regions.hint: Enemy row 4.

regions.title: Enemy slot 5 — sprite
regions.hint: Enemy row 5.

regions.title: Enemy slot 6 — sprite
regions.hint: Enemy row 6 (bottom).

recipes.summary: Team view 'Moves & More' (2x3 grid) — the 6 mon icons for species template matching

regions.title: Slot 1 — top-LEFT mon icon
regions.hint: Tight box around ONLY the sprite icon (top-left cell, Raichu). Exclude the purple panel edge, name text, and the gender/type symbols.

regions.title: Slot 2 — top-RIGHT mon icon
regions.hint: Sprite icon of the top-right cell (Garchomp). Sprite only — no name text.

regions.title: Slot 3 — middle-LEFT mon icon
regions.hint: Sprite icon of the middle-left cell (Azumarill).

regions.title: Slot 4 — middle-RIGHT mon icon
regions.hint: Sprite icon of the middle-right cell (Grimmsnarl).

regions.title: Slot 5 — bottom-LEFT mon icon
regions.hint: Sprite icon of the bottom-left cell (Dragonite).

regions.title: Slot 6 — bottom-RIGHT mon icon
regions.hint: Sprite icon of the bottom-right cell (Staraptor).

recipes.summary: Perception ROIs on move menu (after Fight) — move panel + timer only

regions.title: Move panel
regions.hint: Bounding box around the entire right-side move list (all 4 moves + gimmick buttons).

regions.title: Move timer
regions.hint: Countdown digits above the move panel (e.g. 45s).

recipes.summary: Perception ROIs on command menu (before Fight) — Fight button anchor

regions.title: Fight button ROI
regions.hint: Tight box on the orange Fight button on the command menu. Use 20260624_232432.png — not the move menu (Fight is replaced after tap).

recipes.summary: Perception ROI for target overlay detection

regions.title: Target overlay panel
regions.hint: Box around the full 2x2 target grid including Close button.

recipes.summary: Bottom battle-log text box (moves / stat changes / faints / weather)

regions.title: Battle action log
regions.hint: Wide box over the bottom-left/center text line (e.g. 'You defeated ...' or 'Gyarados's Attack rose!'). Make it wide enough for long stat-change sentences; keep height ~1 line to avoid the field below.

recipes.summary: Force-switch / in-battle party screen anchor — red+blue UI around the player name

regions.title: Force-switch anchor — red/blue player-name UI
regions.hint: Tight box around the distinctive red+blue UI around the player name (the 'Clams' pill area). Pick a region that ONLY appears on the party / force-switch screen so it cheaply discriminates that screen from normal battle.

recipes.summary: Per-row mon sprite icons on the in-battle party / force-switch screen (for species->row mapping; the list reorders as mons switch in)

regions.title: Party row 1 — mon sprite
regions.hint: Tight box around ONLY the mon portrait/sprite on the FAR RIGHT of row 1 (top row, Milotic here). Sprite art only — exclude name/HP text and the row panel edge.

regions.title: Party row 2 — mon sprite
regions.hint: Sprite on the far right of row 2 (Sinistcha here).

regions.title: Party row 3 — mon sprite
regions.hint: Sprite on the far right of row 3 (Ceruledge here).

regions.title: Party row 4 — mon sprite
regions.hint: Sprite on the far right of row 4 (Ninetales here).

regions.title: Party row 5 — mon sprite
regions.hint: Sprite on the far right of row 5 (faded/empty in this shot — draw the box where the sprite would be).

regions.title: Party row 6 — mon sprite
regions.hint: Sprite on the far right of row 6 (bottom; Incineroar faintly here).
